Race: ALL
Velium Hound Fur

This item can be used in tradeskills.

Race: ALL

Stackable:1000

This item is found on creatures.

The Western Wastes
NPC Name
a rogue dire wolf
a velium hound
Icehackle

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Icewell Keep
Quest Name
Coldain Shawl #8: Blessed Coldain Prayer Shawl

The Western Wastes


Uploaded January 29th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
update from 11 years later :)
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2015 at 2:53 PM Rating: Excellent
tatankaseventh
Guru
783 posts
I just farmed 16 of these for 2 alts doing the shawl quest. Took 55 velium hound kills, so almost exactly a 30% drop rate, not too bad.

The first night I was there, didn't come across many hounds after the first clear. The next night, I had seen the comment someone left about also clearing the mastadons and brontotheriums. Doing that improved the spawn quite a bit.

Also, I wouldn't want to even consider this camp without a tracker.

Tat
____________________________
Tatanka Wolfdancer, 115 Wood Elf Druid, 9 x 300+ Master Artisan, 7 maxed trophies (dang research! :)
Michone, 115 Troll Shadowknight
Anaceup Mysleeves, 115 Erudite Mage, 2 x 300 Master Artisan
Snookims Whinslow, 112 Erudite Enchanter, 2 x 300 Master Artisan
<Inisfree>, Tunare (Seventh Hammer!)

# May 26 2004 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
Sannto
View User Forum
37 posts
Since anyone has posted anything on this. I was in WW last night for HOURS and only came across ONE freakin hound - and of course, he didn't drop anything. Is there a particular part of the zone they stay in?

any info would be fantastic.

Oh yea.. one more thing: There was someone on Tunare selling these at 2k EACH. Since I need at least a stack (will have some fails), that's just not an option.
Thanks!~

▲ Page top
RE: Been a while...
QuoteReply
# May 27 2004 at 12:54 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592255473800
Scholar
619 posts
on prexus they are spawning underwater in the SW corner, and then appear to be getting stuck underworld.

Just got a bunch for my twink, and I ended up swimming underwater along the ledge until they agrod and warped up.

If you can, get a tracker to track them a few times so you get a feel for where they are getting stuck, then just swim along there every few hours agroign any spawns.

Messy I know, but better than then prices in bazaar
▲ Page top
Furs
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2002 at 4:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773131828
13 posts
These are easy to solo for my enchanter. They do run fast so sow is a must. Cast illusion imp for lev so you can get far enough ahead of em to root if the charm breaks on you buffed Masto or Bronto pet. Run it up a hill and fly away from the hill when it is on the way down the hill you can easily root em before they get to you. Recharm pet. The biggest problem is running all over the zone trying to find em.
Galedorm 51 warr
Ringer 58 ench
Jordanak 59 cleric
Seventh
▲ Page top
The low-down
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 5:42 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251336082
Scholar
34 posts
+ These furs are used in high-end tailoring recipes, most notably they are used in the 8th Coldain Prayer Shawl quest for which you will need at least 8 of them (or more if you fail on any combines).

+ These furs come from Velium Hounds in Western Wastes. They are level 50-53 mobs that hit around 150 and run very fast, don't count on being able to outrun them. Some classes can solo these in their high 50s. They are not unusually MR, so you can snare and fear them. They are animals so you can use the panic-animal and charm-animal line of spells on them.

+ This zone is filled with mobs on CoV faction...so if you are non-KoS to CoV then it makes hunting them alot easier. But the bummer is that they are on the same spawntable as the CoV wyverns and wurms...with most people not wanting to hurt CoV faction, it is very difficult to find the hounds up. A good idea is to visit WW following a server reset.

+ On rare occasion you can find a player selling the furs for prices ranging anywhere from 1k (bargain) to 10k (rip-off). IMO a fair price for these furs is 3k each...at least thats what I'd pay for them considering the difficulty in obtaining them.
▲ Page top
RE: The low-down
QuoteReply

# Oct 02 2003 at 1:53 AM Rating: Decent

Scholar

Drop rate was increased since these posts were made, so the prices have come down quite a bit. Still uncommon to see for sale, but cheaper now. They run for anywhere from 400-1k on E'ci.
▲ Page top
RE: The low-down
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2004 at 6:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761912254
135 posts
I have hunted in WW alot with my 53 druid, and while it is not hard to solo these, or the other non-CoV animals, I can tell you, as of the last time I was there in mid-October, they couldn't have increased the drop rate much at all. I have killed at least 50 hounds and NEVER seen so much as one velium hound fur drop. Now granted, if in fact they DID increase the drop rate, I really would not have wanted to try for these drops before that! LOL!! (In any case, I know I am also just unlucky, since 0 for 50 is just absurd for anything...well, except Quillmane...stingy horse!)
▲ Page top
RE: The low-down

# Sep 26 2002 at 7:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759256794
View User Forum
Scholar
48 posts
Fair price for these furs is 3k?? I'd say 1k to 1500pp based on the going rate on Povar. But still, they are hard to come by. And ever since the GENIUSES at VI decided to make the "engraved" droppable version of the armor needed for the 8th shawl, you can prolly expect to pay 2k for each one you need. Way to ***** us over on getting that 8th shawl done!!! Lucky for me, I am a grandmaster brewer who knows a few people that hunt the hounds, and they needed my help with 9th coldain ring ale ( trivial 247 if i am not mistaken ).
▲ Page top
RE: The low-down
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2004 at 4:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759794992
9 posts
For the 8th shawl, you need Imbued, not Engraved Royal Velium. Engraved is droppable, Imbued is NO DROP. Just for clarification is all :)

Edited, Wed Mar 3 04:50:23 2004

Indeed you can...

Velium hound fur cloak:
4 velium hound furs,
platinum thread,
cloak pattern,
vial of purified mana

AC 8, STR 8, STA 10,
sv fire 5, sv cold 5,
wt 1.9,
all/all
